{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Printing Koryeo's icon to Snail Shell can better blend into the local scene for information gathering, as well as to gain a certain protection.
|affct=FTH
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Neutral Chest (0.8%)
|color=green
|earth=3
|water=2
|fire=1
|wind=0
|form=Angel
|element=Fire
|realm=Koryeo
|orangehard=ATK
}}
